paper_title: Research on situation of environmental education for primary students in rural areas of Hau Giang province

entities.description: The main subject of the research focusing on teaching students about the nature and environmental protection.

entities.id: Adding environmental topics in science subjects

entities.id: Effectiveness of extra-curricular activities by community resources (46%)

entities.description: The ratio of parents willing to change bad environmental habits based on school education.
